content.en:
Another time passed.

On this day, Ye Tian finally completely mastered the 100 million changes of the Endless Dao, causing the transformation of the Endless Dao.

"Finally mastered hundreds of millions of changes in the Endless Dao, and can merge the origin of the Endless Dao into the origin of the Origin Realm Sea!"

Immediately.

Ye Tian began to hook up with the origin of the Origin Realm Sea.

Rumble!!!!

The hundreds of millions of changes in the Endless Dao turned the power of the Endless Dao into the power of the Origin and entered the Origin of the Origin Sea.

The next moment.

There is one more kind of origin in the Origin Realm Sea—the Endless Dao Origin!

At this time, many masters above the Eighth Realm level had sensed that the Origin Realm Sea had undergone a slight change, while those above the Ninth Realm knew that the Origin Realm Sea had an additional Origin.

This shows that there is an Eternal Master who has completely embarked on the path of self-creation and change, and can absorb the origin of the Origin Realm Sea to improve his strength.

......

Wanyuan Mountain.

The Ten Elements Ancestor looked at the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, and then looked at Ye Tian through time and space.

"Ye Tian's progress is not bad, and his foundation is stable, it is stable to become a Ten Realm-level controller, but it is still unknown whether he can become a pioneer like me!"

Immediately, he closed his eyes and stopped paying attention to the matter.

Ye Tian's progress was just a small matter for him.

......

Rumble!!!!

The origin of the Endless Dao has completely turned into a kind of origin of the Origin Realm Sea.

And at this moment, Ye Tian had an unimaginable connection with the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, and he could absorb the origin of the Origin Realm Sea at any time.

"Let's try to absorb the origin of the Origin Realm Sea first!"

Ye Tian immediately hooked up with the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, forming a huge hole channel, and countless origin forces surged, which were absorbed and refined by Ye Tian's controlled body, turning into his own power.

Basically, in the Origin Realm Sea, only when you break through and become an eternal controller, will you absorb a small amount of Origin Realm Sea Origin Power, which has little impact on the body, it is a controllable Origin Degree, and the body will not be homogenized by the Origin Sea.

But at the moment.

Ye Tian frantically absorbed and devoured these origin powers, and used the power of the secret of devouring, the speed of devouring the origin power of the origin realm sea was naturally extremely fast.

And the more the origin was devoured, Ye Tian obviously sensed that his controlled body was slowly being eroded and assimilated by the origin of the origin boundary sea.

Of course, the pace of this assimilation is slow and slow.

But if you cultivate for countless years, there are many, many origins devoured, and the degree of assimilation will be very high in the end.

"According to what we know, the Ten Realm-level controllers must control the degree of origin assimilation at less than seventy percent, while the Nine Realm-level controllers should control it below thirty percent!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If you exceed that limit, you're in trouble.

For example, Senior Brother Jiang You and many Nine Realm-level Eternal Controllers, the degree of origin assimilation has actually exceeded seventy percent, and there is no hope of continuing to break through at all.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian's body became stronger and stronger, and his primordial-level control body was making rapid progress.

This kind of improvement in strength will indeed make the eternal controller who has not been able to progress for countless years unable to control it, and go crazy to swallow the origin, so as to improve his own strength.

"My foundation is extremely solid, and I have just used the Origin Realm Sea Origin Cultivation to cultivate, so I don't have to worry about assimilation for the time being, but once the assimilation level is high, I must collect treasures similar to the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid to offset the assimilation level, otherwise I will not be able to break the shackles of the Ten Realm-level controllers in the future and step into the level of the master. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to cultivate, absorbing the origin cultivation of the Origin Realm Sea, and at the same time, he was also contemplating the changes in a doorway, focusing on the changes in the Endless Dao.

After all, Senior Sister Snow Girl's self-created path changes have reached 300 million, and he has only mastered hundreds of millions of changes in the Endless Dao, there is still a lot of room for improvement, at least it has to be improved to 300 million changes, otherwise how will it impact the Ten Realms-level controllers in the future?

Time flies, and in the blink of an eye, tens of millions of years have passed.

At this time, after Ye Tian took advantage of the secret of devouring and the particularity of the devouring mountain's physique itself, he absorbed countless origins, and his own strength was greatly increased.

If he went to break into the fifth layer of the Taichu Tower now, he would not rely on the Will Blade and the five Ten Thousand Phases Statues, and he would have hoped to break through.

It can be said that his strength has been greatly increased.

But.

Ye Tian's primordial-level control body was still assimilated somewhat, although the degree of assimilation was not large, but there was also a three-percent assimilation degree, that is, a three-point assimilation degree.

Compared to the thirty percent assimilation level limit controlled by the Nine Realm-level masters, he still had a long way to go.

However, if you can compress it, try to compress the degree of assimilation, after all, the lower the degree of assimilation, the better.

But before there was no treasure that offset the degree of assimilation, Ye Tian could only do this if he wanted to make rapid progress.

Now, there is no other way for him to continue to improve except this path.

For example, it doesn't make much sense to create a top-notch origin control technique, even if you create a thousand doors, you can't improve your strength much.

Unless, he can create a control technique that surpasses the top Origin Control Technique, but he can't do it, he hasn't heard of it, maybe he doesn't even know about it.

Resource consumption, the perception of the Tao.

Ye Tian continues to cultivate every day, and has the ability of Dao affinity, his talent has almost no limit, and the mastery of Dao changes is constantly increasing, as if there is no bottleneck, which is also the driving force of Ye Tian's cultivation.

this day.

The Primordial Spiritual Spring Liquid of the Primal Mountain was about to appear, and many Eternal Masters rushed over one by one.

Except for a few top Nine Realm-level controllers, almost all of them are Ten Realm-level controllers, and ordinary Nine Realm-level controllers are not qualified to participate, otherwise a ripple is not something they can bear.

But.

Ye Tian still went to try it, what if he grabbed a copy of the Primal Spirit Spring Liquid?

Taichu Ling Mountain.

Ye Tian came here, and at this time he found that eighteen Ten Realm-level controllers had appeared here, although not all of the Ten Realm-level controllers had come here, but eighteen was not a lot.

And there were only six Nine Realm-level controllers here, and the others didn't dare to come!

Ye Tian's arrival attracted their attention.

"Infinite Master, this is not the place for you, get out!"

A Ten Realm-level master said coldly.
